name: AutoZone, Inc.
description: AutoZone, Inc. is a leading retailer and distributor of automotive replacement parts and accessories in the Americas. Founded in 1979 and headquartered in Memphis, Tennessee, the company provides a wide range of products for cars, SUVs, vans, and light trucks, including new and remanufactured automotive hard parts, maintenance items, accessories, and non-automotive products. AutoZone operates thousands of stores across the United States, Mexico, and Brazil, serving both DIY (do-it-yourself) customers and professional installers through its commercial program.
